channel.title: CGST Circulars - GST Council
channel.description: Unofficial RSS feed of CGST Circulars published on the GST Council website.

item.title: Circular No. 250/07/2025-GST - Reviewing authority, Revisional Authority and Appellate Authority in respect of orders passed by Common Adjudicating Aut
item.description:
Circular No: 250/07/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 24-06-2025

Subject: Reviewing authority, Revisional Authority and Appellate Authority in respect of orders passed by Common Adjudicating Authority (CAA) for show cause notices issued by DGGI

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 249/06/2025-GST - Generation and quoting of Document Identification Number(DIN) on any communication issued by the officers of the Central
item.description:
Circular No: 249/06/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 09-06-2025

Subject: Generation and quoting of Document Identification Number(DIN) on any communication issued by the officers of the Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) to tax payers and other concerned persons

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 248/05/2025-GST - Various issues related to availment of benefit of Section 128A of the CGST Act, 2017
item.description:
Circular No: 248/05/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 27-03-2025

Subject: Various issues related to availment of benefit of Section 128A of the CGST Act, 2017

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 248/05/2025-GST - Various issues related to availment of benefit of Section 128A of the CGST Act, 2017
item.description:
Circular No: 248/05/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 27-03-2025

Subject: Various issues related to availment of benefit of Section 128A of the CGST Act, 2017

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 247/04/2025-GST - Clarification regarding GST rates & classification (goods) based on the recommendations of the GST Council in its 55th m
item.description:
Circular No: 247/04/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 14-02-2025

Subject: Clarification regarding GST rates & classification (goods) based on the recommendations of the GST Council in its 55th meeting held on 21st December, 2024, at Jaisalmer.

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 246/03/2025-GST - Clarification on applicability of late fee for delay in furnishing of FORM GSTR-9C
item.description:
Circular No: 246/03/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 30-01-2025

Subject: Clarification on applicability of late fee for delay in furnishing of FORM GSTR-9C

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 245/02/2025-GST - Clarifications regarding applicability of GST on certain services.
item.description:
Circular No: 245/02/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 28-01-2025

Subject: Clarifications regarding applicability of GST on certain services.

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 244/01/2025-GST - Regularizing payment of GST on co-insurance premium apportioned by the lead insurer to the co-insurer and on ceding /re-
item.description:
Circular No: 244/01/2025-GST

Date of Issue: 28-01-2025

Subject: Regularizing payment of GST on co-insurance premium apportioned by the lead insurer to the co-insurer and on ceding /re-insurance commission deducted from the reinsurance premium paid by the insurer to the reinsurer.

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 243/37/2024-GST - Clarification on various issues pertaining to GST treatment of vouchers
item.description:
Circular No: 243/37/2024-GST

Date of Issue: 31-12-2024

Subject: Clarification on various issues pertaining to GST treatment of vouchers

Download PDF

item.title: Circular No. 242/36/2024-GST - Clarification on place of supply of Online Services supplied by the suppliers of services to unregistered recipients
item.description:
Circular No: 242/36/2024-GST

Date of Issue: 31-12-2024

Subject: Clarification on place of supply of Online Services supplied by the suppliers of services to unregistered recipients

Download PDF
